channel.title: Checkmk on Logan Dawson
channel.description: Recent content in Checkmk on Logan Dawson

item.title: NanoCorp — HackTheBox Walkthrough
item.description: NanoCorp HTB writeup: NTLM capture via ZIP upload, BloodHound ACL abuse, and CVE-2024-0670 Checkmk MSI repair LPE on Windows Server 2022.
